item.title: Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains delayed to June 30
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

No longer due out on June 11.

Publisher Ubisoft and developer Behaviour Interactive have delayed Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains from its previously planned Jun 11 release date to June 30. It will be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Read more about the game here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/monopoly-star-wars-heroes-vs-villains-delayed-to-june-30
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Kidbash: Super Legend launches in early 2027 for consoles, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

A claymation-style roguelike action platformer.

Roguelike action platformer Kidbash: Super Legend will launch for consoles and PC via Steam in early 2027, publisher Acclaim and Indonesian developers Authentic Remixes and Fat Raccoon announced. While specific platforms were not announced, wishlisting is now available via PlayStation Store and Microsoft Store.

“Kidbash grabbed all of our attention, instantly,” said Acclaim director of publishing and strategic partnerships Marc Anthony Rodriguez in a press release. “It feels like somebody uncovered a lost action classic from the [PlayStation 3] / Dreamcast era and gave it a modern 2020s soul. Authentic Remixes & Fat Raccoon built something with real style, real gameplay, and a ton of personality.”

Rodriguez added, “The second we saw the claymation-real ‘Laika-esque’ vibe of the game world, the mash-up weapon combat, and the sheer energy of it all moving together, we knew this game had something special. This is exactly the kind of bold, memorable indie game Acclaim was brought back to champion!”

Here is an overview of the game, via Acclaim:

About

Welcome to the O.D.D., a world where forgotten video game characters reside.

Kidbash: Super Legend is a roguelike action-platformer that blends nostalgic gameplay with a character-rich story. You’ll play as Kidbash, a hero stricken with amnesia, rediscovering your true identity and purpose while navigating vibrant landscapes of the O.D.D. and conquering challenging levels.

Key Features

  • Play as a Lost Forgotten Hero – Our hero, Kidbash, awakens with no memory of his past, only his name and a burning desire to become a hero. After failing to save the nearby village of Mandala, he seeks training from the legendary master of the mountain, Tao Shen Long, only to discover that he has disappeared.
  • Weapon Mixing – Fill the meter up as you slay enemies, and you’ll be able to combine 2 weapons to create a more powerful one, each with unique mechanics—totally not inspired by Kirby 64.
  • Find Powerful Mod and Weapon Combinations – Pick from a randomized pool of mods that will enhance your platforming and combat. These mods even stack when you mix together your weapons!
  • Village Building and Meta Progression – Help a cast of forgotten characters rebuild their destroyed village. Your meta progression and character development are tied directly to the village’s growth!

Watch a new trailer below.

Publisher Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/kidbash-super-legend-launches-in-early-2027-for-consoles-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
